title: Nigeria sweats in heatwave as Iran war drives up costs to stay cool
summary_full: Lagos swelters under a brutal heatwave, exacerbated by soaring fuel prices that make air conditioning and generators unaffordable. Millions face sweltering commutes and sleepless nights as temperatures climb. Experts link the rising heat to climate change, urban density, and generator emissions, while traders prioritize survival over health warnings amid the crisis.
